transcript: Speaker A: I am full confusion. Speaker B: Full confusion? तू डब्बा भरून confusion घेऊन फिरतेस का? तू असं म्हणू शकतेस "I am confused". [Full confusion? Do you carry a box full of confusion? You can say "I am confused".] Speaker A: Ok ok, don't know much English. Speaker B: AI teacher try केलास का? [Did you try an AI teacher?] Speaker A: ते खूप महाग असतील ना? [They must be very expensive, right?] Speaker B: अजिबात नाही. MySivi app download कर आणि फक्त १ रुपयाच्या trial मध्ये AI teachers सोबत English शिकायला सुरुवात कर. फक्त रोजचे १५ मिनिट practice कर आणि २-३ आठवड्यातच English मध्ये improvement दिसायला लागेल. [Not at all. Download MySivi app and start learning English with AI teachers in just a 1 rupee trial. Just practice 15 minutes daily and you will see improvement in English in 2-3 weeks.] Speaker A: बरं, आत्ताच MySivi app download करते. [Okay, downloading MySivi app right now.] Speaker B: तुम्ही आजच MySivi app download करा आणि English बोलायला सुरुवात करा. [You too download MySivi app today and start speaking English.]
on_screen_text: I am full, full confusion, तू डब्बा भरून [You box full], confusion घेऊन [carrying confusion], फिरतेस का [do you roam?], तू असं म्हणू शकतेस [You can say this], I am confused, ok ok don't know, much english, AI teacher try, केलास का [did you try?], ते खूप महाग असतील [they must be very expensive], अजिबात नाही [not at all], MySivi, MySivi app download, कर आणि फक्त [do and only], 1 रुपयाच्या [1 rupee's], trial मध्ये [in trial], AI, teachers सोबत [with teachers], English शिकायला [to learn English], सुरुवात कर [start], फक्त रोजचे [only daily], 10-15 MINUTES, practice, कर आणि 2-3 [do and 2-3], आठवड्यातच [weeks itself], English, improvement, दिसायला लागेल [will start showing], बरं [okay], आत्ताच [right now], app download, करते [doing], MySivi AI English Speaking
summary: A Marathi-speaking woman is corrected by an AI avatar after making a grammatical error. The AI introduces the MySivi app, highlighting its affordable 1-rupee trial and promising quick English improvement with daily practice. The ad concludes with a call to download the app.
